summary.headline: HumbleStudio now has a working hybrid design viewer plus native review and navigation surfaces that carry proposal scope, linked ticket, source-audit, and read-only apply readiness truth directly in the inspection flow.
notes: Percentages are directional maturity estimates, not precise scorecards.
Repo-owned status belongs in this file so shared tooling reads repo truth instead of replacing it.
The new HS ticket store should own future non-trivial HumbleStudio work.
The web and native loaders can now truthfully offer a small supported-app catalog, including direct load and transparent URL-prefill paths.
Read-only workflow surfaces should stay truthful and avoid mutating repo state implicitly.
Review queue and navigation audit cards now reuse shared proposal scope truth instead of each inferring proposal linkage independently.

refresh_cadence.repo_workflow: Refresh after every non-trivial implementation slice and before promotion to main.
refresh_cadence.proposal_linkage: Refresh after saving or editing repo-backed proposal artifacts in docs/change-proposals/.
refresh_cadence.web_fallback: Refresh after any index.html, studio.css, or js/ fallback change by running Scripts/check_web_fallback.py.

evidence_commands.summary: The local repo contract validated successfully against the HumbleControl-owned shared standard, with only the expected custom-localization warning.
Validated the repo-native HS ticket surface and first onboarding ticket.
Strict repo doctor stays a branch-freshness gate and is expected to fail from an active topic branch instead of a clean main checkout.
The repo-native ticket board now renders HS tickets together with lane occupancy from local repo truth.
The repo-native status surface now renders current git, ticket, worktree, and lane context on top of `.humble/status/current.json`.
The repo-native status summary now has a reader-friendly text and Mermaid renderer for review and planning.
The static web fallback now has an explicit script-based integrity check for local assets, markup anchors, bundled JSON fixtures, and the supported-app picker anchor.
HumbleStudio now has a single repo-local workflow gate for ticket, contract, web fallback, script compilation, and diff hygiene checks.
The native macOS workspace builds after tying review queue and navigation audit surfaces to shared proposal scope truth.
The repo-documented native CI path regenerated the project and completed a build-only macOS sanity pass for HS-0038.

operating_layers.label: Native workspace
operating_layers.signal: The macOS workspace is now the primary truthful surface for inspection, proposal artifacts, ticket linkage, source-audit posture, and read-only apply guidance.
operating_layers.next_move: Move the same explicit truth discipline into preview geometry, safe-area behavior, and remaining native fidelity gaps.

operating_layers.label: Web fallback
operating_layers.signal: The static viewer remains a fallback, but it now offers a truthful one-click picker for a few known repo exports instead of relying only on manual URL and file entry.
operating_layers.next_move: Keep the catalog honest, small, and explicitly shared across web and native loaders instead of growing ad hoc per repo.

operating_layers.label: Repo workflow
operating_layers.signal: The repository now has contract, ticket, status, lane, proposal-linkage, and local check surfaces, but it still needs routine operational use.
operating_layers.next_move: Use the new ticket allocator, lane starter, and local check wrapper on the next real implementation slice instead of staying in manual workflow mode.

top_gaps.title: Verify preview safe-area geometry in the running macOS inspector across portrait and landscape devices
Model safe-area-aware preview chrome so navigation, tab, and dismiss controls honor selected device insets
Add preview surface geometry tests for orientation, device canvas, size class, and safe-area selections
Refine sheet geometry by device class, detent shape, and landscape behavior
Make full-screen cover behavior explicit in the preview contract and canvas affordances
Improve navigation preview fidelity by deriving breadcrumb and back affordances from exported navigation edges
Complete the most visible component native preview gaps that still require fallback support
Complete view native preview gaps using exported snapshot and navigation evidence
Add a repeatable native preview visual verification note alongside the build workflow
Prepare HS-0015 TestFlight upload only after the native preview QA matrix is truthful enough for internal review
